headline: Novo Nordisk (NYSE:NVO) Launches Pan European Obesity Research Push As Pfizer Closes In
summary: Novo Nordisk (NYSE:NVO)'s majority owner has launched a large pan European research program focused on obesity and cardiometabolic diseases. The initiative aims to speed up research, support startups, and feed potential candidates into Novo Nordisk's future drug pipeline. Pfizer is expanding efforts in obesity treatments, including plans for a first in class monthly GLP 1 therapy and broader clinical trials. Novo Nordisk is a central player in obesity and diabetes care, and this new...
